mapper.select: select qc.*, c.name as categoryName from `question_contribution` qc left join `question_category` c on qc.category_id = c.id where qc.id = #{id}

select qc.*, c.name as categoryName from `question_contribution` qc left join `question_category` c on qc.category_id = c.id where qc.user_id = #{userId} and qc.user_role = #{userRole} order by qc.created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into `question_contribution` (user_id, user_name, user_role, category_id, type, content, options, answer, analysis, difficulty, status) values (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{userRole}, #{categoryId}, #{type}, #{content}, #{options}, #{answer}, #{analysis}, #{difficulty}, #{status})
